name: Steamed Brown Bread,for Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Daub a paper towel with butter and rub evenly on the sides and bottom of coffee cans or molds. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine flours, cornmeal, baking soda, and salt. Add buttermilk and molasses, blending until smooth. Add raisins and mix until scattered throughout the mixture.
3. Scrape the batter into the prepared cans or molds. Cover tightly with aluminum foil.
4. Place the mold into a large pot and fill with hot water, ensuring it reaches halfway up the sides of the mold. With help, place the pot on the stove and bring to a boil. Cover the pot.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 3 hours. Replenish water in the pot every hour.
6. When ready, turn off the heat. With help, remove the mold from the pot and unmold by turning the bread upside down.
7. To cut the bread, wrap a piece of string around it and pull tight through the loaf. It will easily cut warm bread into a clean slice. Makes 2 small loaves or one large loaf.
